front.title: Lifecycle and State Extensions for TVR Schedule YANG Model

abstract.t:
The Time-Variant Routing (TVR) YANG data model [I-D.ietf-tvr-schedule-yang] defines a mechanism to describe scheduled changes in network resources (such as nodes and topology) as a function of time. However, the base model does not provide explicit lifecycle management semantics for the schedules, such as activation, suspension, or deprecation.
This document defines an optional augmentation of the base YANG model to introduce lifecycle and administrative state control, enabling more flexible operational handling of schedules without modifying the base model semantics.
